measures.title: Sediment and Erosion Control Plan
measures.description: Install silt fencing, sediment ponds, and erosion blankets along watercourse boundaries. Maintain 30m riparian buffer zones.

measures.title: Noise Mitigation Strategy
measures.description: Restrict construction to daytime hours (7AM-7PM). Use noise barriers around sensitive receptors. Equipment fitted with mufflers.

measures.title: Wildlife Movement Corridor Preservation
measures.description: Maintain wildlife crossing structures. Install wildlife-friendly fencing. Schedule construction outside sensitive migration periods.

measures.title: Air Quality Management Plan
measures.description: Implement dust suppression (water sprays, chemical stabilisers). Monitor PM2.5 and PM10 at site boundaries. Cease operations during inversions.

measures.title: Spill Prevention and Response
measures.description: Maintain spill kits at all fuel storage and equipment areas. Secondary containment for hazardous materials. 24-hour spill response protocol.

measures.title: Greenhouse Gas Emissions Offset Programme
measures.description: Quantify project GHG emissions. Purchase carbon offsets from certified programmes. Implement energy efficiency measures on-site.

measures.title: Indigenous Community Engagement Protocol
measures.description: Establish formal consultation framework with affected First Nations. Integrate Traditional Ecological Knowledge. Benefit-sharing agreements.

measures.title: Progressive Reclamation Plan
measures.description: Reclaim disturbed areas progressively during operations. Use native seed mixes. Restore original topography and drainage patterns.

measures.title: Aquatic Habitat Compensation
measures.description: Create or enhance aquatic habitat at 2:1 ratio for any lost habitat. Install fish passage structures. Restore spawning substrate.

measures.title: Visual Impact Reduction
measures.description: Use earth-tone colours for structures. Maintain vegetation screens. Minimise night lighting with directional fixtures.
